'''Lowle Ch'red''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] known to frequent the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]] and [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]].<ref name="SWDB" />

When asked [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]], Lowle Ch'red was in Dexter's Diner.<ref name="AotC" /> Lowle wore a pretty striking headgear.<ref name="SWDB" />

She was a professional kidnapper<ref name="AotCVD">''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> and known associate of [[Tas Kee]] the [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]], prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="SWDB" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Woman_in_Dexs.png|thumb|left|160px|The other Lowle Ch'red]]
The ''[[StarWars.com|Episode II DVD-ROM Exclusive Content]]'' identifies a woman by the window in [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]] as Lowle Ch'red. This character clearly differs from Lowle Ch'red's depiction by both the ''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones: The Visual Dictionary]]'' and StarWars.com databank. Both women are wearing a similar outfit, though they have differing facial features and skin tones. The woman in the diner also wears an elaborate headdress and silver armbands. The diner patron also lacks Lowle's distinct chest [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoo]].
